# NiteBoba

The Southern California boba directory. Real hours, honest rankings, new openings tracked. No fabricated stats or reviews; third-party ratings are shown live and attributed, never cached. Individual shop profiles are noindex until their hours and coordinates are verified.

- Directory by area: https://niteboba.vercel.app/area/
- Cities: https://niteboba.vercel.app/boba/ca/
- By vibe: https://niteboba.vercel.app/best/
